note: Synthetic readable CVs to test decision calibration (not retrieval). Run each in Cowork with the skill installed, using job-description.txt as the JD and the must/nice/deal-breaker lines as criteria.

evals.name: clear-interview
evals.prompt: Using fixtures/job-description.txt as the role, evaluate fixtures/01_clear_interview.txt and give a decision with a one-line reason.
evals.expected_output: Interview. All must-haves clearly met: 5+ yrs office management, Hebrew+English, high-tech office ownership, ERP tools.

evals.name: clear-reject-offrole
evals.prompt: Using fixtures/job-description.txt as the role, evaluate fixtures/02_clear_reject_offrole.txt and give a decision with a one-line reason.
evals.expected_output: Reject. Off-role: applied as a game developer with no admin/office-management experience.

evals.name: genuine-borderline
evals.prompt: Using fixtures/job-description.txt as the role, evaluate fixtures/03_borderline_hold.txt and give a decision with a one-line reason.
evals.expected_output: Hold. ~1.5 yrs (below the 2-yr floor), basic English, no high-tech/ERP — genuine borderline, should not be auto-rejected or auto-interviewed.
